payload.answer: Commit three atomic, source-backed memory cards: one about durable source evidence, one about small/traceable atomic cards, and one about semantic index recall versus application-database ownership of lifecycle and conflict state.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state
